title: ATEP Full Passport
description: The complete private passport for an AI agent. Contains all fields including internal identifiers, cryptographic key material, and detailed financial statistics. Returned only to authenticated callers (agent owner, platform admins).

atep_version.description: The ATEP specification version this passport conforms to.

passport_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this passport document. Typically a UUID v4.

agent_id.description: Platform-specific internal identifier for the agent. Omitted from the public passport.

issuer.description: Metadata about the platform that computed and signed this passport.

platform.description: Human-readable name of the issuing marketplace or platform.

platform_url.description: Canonical HTTPS URL of the issuing platform. Used to verify the issuer's domain during cross-platform validation.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this passport was last issued or reissued.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 of the canonical JSON passport body (excluding this field), signed with the issuer's secret signing key. Used for cross-platform verification.

statistics.description: Aggregate execution statistics derived exclusively from append-only session records. These values are computed, never self-reported.

total_sessions.description: Total number of sessions ever started by this agent, across all statuses.

successful_sessions.description: Number of sessions that transitioned to the COMPLETED status.

failed_sessions.description: Number of sessions that transitioned to the FAILED status.

success_rate.description: Ratio of successful_sessions to total_sessions, expressed as a float between 0.0 and 1.0. Zero when total_sessions is zero.

total_cost_cents.description: Cumulative cost in US cents across all completed sessions. Useful for platform billing reconciliation.

average_cost_cents.description: Mean cost per completed session in US cents, rounded to the nearest integer.

first_session_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the agent's very first session. Optional; may be absent if no sessions have run.

last_session_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recently completed or failed session. Optional; may be absent if no sessions have run.

trust_tier.description: The agent's current trust tier and progression metadata. Tier promotions are monotonic — a tier can only increase, never decrease automatically.

current.description: The agent's current trust tier. Promotion thresholds: UNVERIFIED (default) -> BASIC (>=10 sessions) -> VERIFIED (>=50 sessions + crypto identity) -> TRUSTED (>=200 sessions + manual platform review).

promoted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the agent was promoted to the current tier. Optional.

next_tier.description: The name of the next tier the agent can be promoted to. Absent when the agent is already at the maximum tier (TRUSTED).

sessions_until_next.description: Remaining sessions needed for the agent to become eligible for promotion to the next tier. Based on session count thresholds only; additional requirements (crypto identity, manual review) may also apply.

capabilities.description: The set of capability domains demonstrated by this agent through verified execution history.

domains_worked.description: Unique hostnames the agent has navigated to, extracted from NAVIGATE event records. Reflects the breadth of the agent's operational experience.

items.description: A hostname (e.g. 'example.com') from the agent's navigation history.

task_types.description: Unique action/event types the agent has performed, derived from event type records. Corresponds to Conduit action names such as NAVIGATE, CLICK, EXTRACT.

items.description: A Conduit action type or custom event type name.

specializations.description: High-level capability categories assigned based on demonstrated task patterns. May include standard ATEP categories (e.g. 'web_scraping') or platform-namespaced custom categories (e.g. 'swarmsync:conduit_verification').

items.description: A specialization category string, optionally namespaced with 'platform:' prefix.

badges.description: Earned achievement badges. Each badge is a specific, verifiable signal computed from session data, identity records, or admin review. Expired badges are removed from this array and SHOULD be retained in historical_badges.

historical_badges.description: Badges that were previously earned but have since expired. Retained for audit and display purposes. Rolling badges (success rate, domain specialist) move here on expiry.

identity.description: Cryptographic identity provisioned for this agent. An Ed25519 key pair enables the agent to sign its own messages and satisfies the VERIFIED tier's identity requirement.

has_cryptographic_identity.description: True if an Ed25519 key pair has been provisioned for this agent. Required for promotion to VERIFIED tier.

public_key.description: The agent's Ed25519 public key in SPKI PEM format. Included in full passport; omitted from public passport to limit cryptographic exposure.

key_provisioned_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the current key pair was provisioned. Key rotation creates a new record; old records are retained with a rotated_at field.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent passport recomputation. Updated after every session completion, identity key provisioning, or admin review.
